title: Curated food-group catalog for the serving log
description: ~24 food groups at the HABIT tier (one serving = one tap) for the serving log (issue #579), each with a stable slug (food_log.group_key), a serving description, a tier (encourage/limit/neutral), the #577 nutrient-food-map keys it's a source of, an optional protein_g the #767 protein-adequacy estimate sums as a FLOOR, and an optional fiber_g the #976 fiber-adequacy estimate sums the same way. Committed + HUMAN-REVIEWABLE. Regenerate with `npm run gen:food-groups`. INFORMATIONAL dietary guidance, NOT medical advice.

citation.source: USDA FoodData Central (SR Legacy / Foundation Foods)
citation.note: Representative per-serving protein grams (protein_g) and dietary-fiber grams (fiber_g), each rounded to whole grams for the described serving.
Encourage/limit/neutral group tiers reflect general dietary-pattern guidance; groupings are curated and human-reviewable.

entries.name: Fatty fish
entries.serving: A palm-sized fillet (~4 oz) of salmon, sardines, mackerel, herring

entries.name: White / lean fish
entries.serving: A palm-sized fillet (~4 oz) of cod, tilapia, haddock

entries.name: Shellfish
entries.serving: ~3 oz of shrimp, clams, mussels, oysters

entries.name: Leafy greens
entries.serving: A cup of raw (or ½ cup cooked) spinach, kale, chard, romaine

entries.name: Cruciferous vegetables
entries.serving: ½ cup of broccoli, cauliflower, Brussels sprouts, cabbage

entries.name: Other vegetables
entries.serving: ½ cup of peppers, carrots, tomatoes, squash

entries.name: Legumes & beans
entries.serving: ½ cup of cooked lentils, chickpeas, black beans, tofu

entries.name: Nuts & seeds
entries.serving: A small handful (~1 oz) of almonds, walnuts, pumpkin seeds, chia

entries.name: Whole grains
entries.serving: ½ cup of cooked oats, brown rice, quinoa, whole-grain bread

entries.name: Fruit
entries.serving: One piece or ~½ cup of whole fruit

entries.name: Berries
entries.serving: ½ cup of blueberries, strawberries, raspberries

entries.name: Fermented foods
entries.serving: A serving of yogurt, kefir, sauerkraut, kimchi, miso

entries.name: Poultry
entries.serving: A palm-sized portion (~4 oz) of chicken or turkey

entries.name: Eggs
entries.serving: One to two eggs

entries.name: Dairy
entries.serving: A cup of milk, a slice of cheese, ¾ cup of yogurt

entries.name: Red meat
entries.serving: A palm-sized portion (~4 oz) of beef, pork, lamb

entries.name: Potatoes & starchy veg
entries.serving: One medium potato or ½ cup of sweet potato, corn, peas

entries.name: Water
entries.serving: A glass (~8 oz) of water or unsweetened drink

entries.name: Processed meat
entries.serving: A serving of bacon, sausage, deli meat, hot dogs

entries.name: Refined grains
entries.serving: A serving of white bread, white rice, pasta, crackers

entries.name: Fried / fast food
entries.serving: A serving of fried or fast food

entries.name: Sugary foods & desserts
entries.serving: A dessert, candy, or sweetened snack

entries.name: Sugar-sweetened drinks
entries.serving: A soda, juice drink, or sweetened coffee/tea

entries.name: Alcohol
entries.serving: One standard drink (12 oz beer, 5 oz wine, 1.5 oz spirits)
